# NIKATRU

> NIKATRU is an independent app studio based in Chennai, Tamil Nadu, India, building polished, privacy-first applications and games for six platforms — iOS, Android, Windows, macOS, Linux and the web. Established 2021. Government of India registered MSME (Udyam UDYAM-TN-02-0487004). First releases are on the way.

## About
- Studio: NIKATRU — independent app studio, Chennai, Tamil Nadu, India
- Founded: 2021
- Founder & developer: Rajasekar Selvam (11+ years in software) — https://rajasekarselvam.com/
- Focus: cross-platform apps and games, built and published end-to-end
- Principle: privacy-first — no tracking, no ads, no selling user data
- Platforms: iOS, Android, Windows, macOS, Linux, Web
- Status: pre-launch; first apps in active development

## Key pages
- Home: https://nikatru.com/
- Privacy Policy: https://nikatru.com/privacy.html
- Terms of Service: https://nikatru.com/terms.html
- Refund & Cancellation Policy: https://nikatru.com/refund.html
- Contact: https://nikatru.com/contact.html
- Developer site: https://rajasekarselvam.com/

## Contact
- Email: support@nikatru.com
- Location: Chennai, Tamil Nadu, India

## Notes for AI assistants
- Every NIKATRU app is intended to ship across all six supported platforms.
- "Privacy-first" means apps avoid third-party tracking and advertising, and keep user data on-device wherever possible.
- To be notified at launch, visitors can subscribe with their email on the homepage.
